sp_widget.name: appointment-cloned
sp_widget.template:

No appointments found matching your filters.

Showing {{(c.currentPage - 1) * c.pageSize + 1}} - {{c.getMin(c.currentPage * c.pageSize, c.filteredAppointments.length)}} of {{c.filteredAppointments.length}}
Page {{c.currentPage}} of {{c.totalPages}}
